arts.ttl: Sources: Tottenham's stance on Omar Alderete explained as Wolves offered £13m La Liga ace
Premier League: Predictions for all five games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 16 this weekend and Jack Ogalbe has collated our writers' best bets for all five games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Wolves scout at work on Thursday evening – Usual transfer shopping plans
arts.sum: Over the past few seasons, Wolves have been no strangers to signing players from Portugal. Super agent Jorge Mendes has famously been involved at Wolves and in the current squad, the likes of Rayan Ait-Nouri, Nelson Semedo and Matt Doherty are represented by the Portuguese’s agency Gestifute. arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Lemina stripped of Wolves captaincy after West Ham clashes
arts.sum: Mario Lemina has been stripped of the Wolves captaincy.

arts.ttl: Wolves midfielder Mario Lemina replaced as captain on permanent basis in aftermath of West Ham squabble
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers head coach Gary O'Neil reveals that Mario Lemina has been removed from his position as club captain, just days after an on-pitch squabble at West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Ipswich Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Wolves host Ipswich on Saturday afternoon in a key clash in the battle to avoid relegation from the Premier League. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our pre...
O’Neil said: “The discussions with Mario were good. “I have a lot of respect for Mario, and what he’s still going to be able to do for us.

Having started every Premier League match so far this season, Joao Gomes will be sitting this one out as the midfielder picked up his fifth booking of the campaign in Monday evening’s defeat to West Ham United. Ipswich arrive at Molineux level on points with Wolves but sit one place above them in the Premier League table due to having conceded 11 fewer goals than Saturday’s hosts.

arts.ttl: 'Insane' Manager is Serious Contender to Replace O'Neil at Wolves
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are interested in replacing Gary O’Neil with Luton Town manager Rob Edwards.
